title: galium verum var. trachycaulis
intro: Galium verum var. trachycaulis, also known as yellow bedstraw or golden bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium verum plant, a flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galium verum var. trachycaulis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and soothing digestive issues, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Galium verum var. trachycaulis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
